# EmailsLy

> Verified B2B lead data on demand. EmailsLy delivers clean, ready-to-use contact exports from Apollo, ZoomInfo, and LinkedIn — straight to your CRM in 24 hours. No subscriptions, no manual cleaning, pay only for what you need.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Verified B2B leads from Apollo, ZoomInfo & LinkedIn delivered in 24 hours.
- [About](/about): Who EmailsLy is for, data accuracy claims, and company background.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent per-lead and flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees.
- [Lead Store](/store): Prebuilt, verified B2B lead lists available for instant download.
- [Blog](/blog): Field-tested playbooks on cold email deliverability, B2B data, ICP scoring, technographic targeting, and RevOps.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the EmailsLy team.
- [Track Order](/track-order): Requires an account — sign in to view the status of orders placed on your account.
- [Sample Data](/sample-data): Preview free lead list samples before buying.

## Products & Services

- Apollo lead exports — bulk B2B contact CSVs from Apollo search filters.
- ZoomInfo lead exports — verified executive and company data.
- LinkedIn Sales Navigator lead exports — targeted prospect lists.
- Manual lead research — 100% human-verified custom ICP research.
- Prebuilt lead lists — SaaS founders, Shopify Plus owners, Fortune 1000 execs, startup founders, real estate agents, healthcare providers, and more.

## Key Facts

- 100M+ verified B2B contacts sourced.
- 99% data accuracy rate.
- 24-hour average delivery time.
- Delivery format: clean, ready-to-import CSV.
- Payment methods: card, bank transfer, and crypto.
- Built for sales teams, agencies, recruiters, and founders.
